findings.title: Function map: {{function|cgi_handler}} and request dispatch
findings.summary: {{function|cgi_handler}} parses CGI form fields then dispatches by command; FUN_00401abc is the request struct constructor.
findings.reasoning: Renamed FUN_00401abc -> parse_request based on field offsets and the strcpy/atoi usage; cgi_handler reads 'token' and 'user' then branches on 'cmd'. The parsing routine resembles code seen in {{sibling_target_id}}.
